imaginative.en: She wrote an imaginative story about space.
imaginative.zh: 她寫了一個富有想像力的太空故事。

imitate.en: The parrot can imitate human speech.

imitation.en: The bag is a cheap imitation of a brand.
imitation.zh: 這個包是名牌的廉價仿冒品。

immigrant.en: Many immigrants started new lives here.
immigrant.zh: 許多移民在這裡展開新生活。

immigrate.zh: 她的家人移民到加拿大。

immigration.en: We waited in line at immigration.

impact.en: The news had a big impact on the town.
impact.zh: 這則新聞對小鎮影響很大。

imply.en: Her smile implied that she agreed.
imply.zh: 她的微笑暗示她同意了。

impose.en: The school imposed a new rule.
impose.zh: 學校實施了一條新規定。

impression.en: She made a good first impression.
impression.zh: 她給人很好的第一印象。

incident.en: Nobody was hurt in the small incident.
incident.zh: 這個小事件中沒有人受傷。

including.zh: 每個人都來了，包括老師。

incredible.en: The view from the top was incredible.
incredible.zh: 從頂端看的景色令人難以置信。

indication.en: Dark clouds are an indication of rain.

infant.en: The infant slept in her mother's arms.

infection.en: Clean the cut to prevent infection.

inflation.zh: 通貨膨脹讓所有東西都變貴了。

influential.zh: 她是個有影響力的領袖。

informative.en: The talk was clear and informative.
informative.zh: 這場演講清楚又有資訊量。

ingredient.en: Flour is the main ingredient in bread.
ingredient.zh: 麵粉是麵包的主要原料。

initial.en: My initial plan was to walk there.
initial.zh: 我最初的計畫是走路去那裡。

injure.en: He injured his leg during the game.

input.en: We need your input on the plan.
input.zh: 這個計畫需要你的意見。

insert.en: Insert the coin into the machine.

inspection.en: The car passed the safety inspection.
inspection.zh: 這輛車通過了安全檢查。

inspiration.en: Nature is a source of inspiration.

inspire.zh: 她的勇氣激勵了我們所有人。

install.en: They installed a new air conditioner.
install.zh: 他們安裝了一台新冷氣。

instruct.en: The coach instructed us how to swim.
instruct.zh: 教練指導我們如何游泳。

instructor.zh: 我們的駕訓教練很有耐心。

insult.en: It is rude to insult others.

intellectual.zh: 西洋棋是一種益智遊戲。

intelligence.en: Dolphins are known for their intelligence.

intend.en: I intend to study harder this year.
intend.zh: 我打算今年更努力讀書。

intense.en: The heat was intense at noon.

intensity.en: The intensity of the storm increased.

intensive.en: She took an intensive English course.
intensive.zh: 她上了密集的英文課程。

intention.en: His intention was to help, not to hurt.
intention.zh: 他的本意是幫忙，不是傷害。

interact.en: Children learn by interacting with others.
interact.zh: 孩子透過與他人互動來學習。

interaction.en: There was a lot of interaction in class.

interfere.en: Please don't interfere in my work.

intermediate.en: She is at an intermediate level in English.

interpret.en: She interpreted the poem for us.

interruption.en: He worked without interruption for hours.
interruption.zh: 他連續工作了好幾個小時沒被打斷。

intuition.en: Her intuition told her something was wrong.
intuition.zh: 她的直覺告訴她有些不對勁。

invasion.en: The country prepared for an invasion.
invasion.zh: 這個國家為入侵做準備。

invention.en: The wheel was an important invention.
invention.zh: 輪子是一項重要的發明。

invest.en: They invested money in a new shop.
invest.zh: 他們投資錢開了一家新店。

involve.en: The job involves a lot of travel.
involve.zh: 這份工作需要經常出差。

isolation.en: He felt isolation living far from town.
isolation.zh: 住得離城鎮很遠讓他感到孤立。

keen.en: She has a keen interest in science.
keen.zh: 她對科學有濃厚的興趣。

kettle.en: She boiled water in the kettle.

kneel.en: He knelt down to tie his shoe.

knob.en: Turn the knob to open the door.

labor.en: Building the wall took hard labor.
labor.zh: 砌這道牆需要辛苦的勞力。

lag.en: He lagged behind the rest of the group.
lag.zh: 他落後在隊伍的最後面。

landmark.en: The tower is a famous landmark.

largely.en: His success was largely due to luck.
largely.zh: 他的成功大部分歸功於運氣。

launch.en: They will launch a new product next week.
launch.zh: 他們下週將推出新產品。

lawful.en: It is lawful to vote at eighteen.

lean.en: He leaned against the wall to rest.

learned.en: He is a learned and wise man.
learned.zh: 他是個博學又有智慧的人。

lecture.en: We attended a lecture on history.
lecture.zh: 我們聽了一場歷史講座。

lecturer.en: The lecturer spoke clearly and slowly.

legend.en: There is an old legend about the lake.
legend.zh: 關於這座湖有個古老的傳說。

leisurely.en: We took a leisurely walk in the park.
leisurely.zh: 我們在公園悠閒地散步。

librarian.en: The librarian helped me find the book.
librarian.zh: 圖書館員幫我找到那本書。

license.en: You need a license to drive.

lifeguard.zh: 救生員看顧著游泳的人。

limitation.zh: 每個人都有自己的極限。

linen.en: The shirt is made of cool linen.
linen.zh: 這件襯衫是用涼爽的亞麻做的。

lipstick.en: She wore red lipstick to the party.
lipstick.zh: 她擦了紅色口紅去派對。

liquor.en: The store cannot sell liquor to teens.
liquor.zh: 這家店不能賣酒給青少年。

literary.en: She won a literary prize for her novel.
literary.zh: 她的小說贏得了文學獎。

loan.en: He took out a loan to buy a house.

lobster.en: We ate fresh lobster by the sea.
lobster.zh: 我們在海邊吃新鮮的龍蝦。

logic.en: There is no logic in his argument.

logical.zh: 她給了一個合乎邏輯的解釋。

loosen.en: He loosened his tie after work.

lousy.en: I had a lousy day at school.

loyal.en: A dog is a loyal pet.

loyalty.en: We value loyalty in a friend.

luxurious.en: They stayed in a luxurious hotel.
luxurious.zh: 他們住在一家豪華的飯店。

luxury.en: A daily massage is a luxury.

machinery.zh: 這家工廠使用重型機械。

magnetic.en: A compass uses a magnetic needle.

makeup.en: She put on light makeup for the show.

manual.en: Read the manual before using the machine.
manual.zh: 使用機器前先讀說明書。

manufacture.en: They manufacture cars in this city.
manufacture.zh: 他們在這座城市製造汽車。

manufacturer.zh: 製造商測試了每件產品。

marathon.en: She trained hard to run a marathon.
marathon.zh: 她努力訓練以跑馬拉松。

margin.en: Write your notes in the margin.

maturity.en: She handled the problem with maturity.
maturity.zh: 她成熟地處理了這個問題。

maximum.en: The maximum speed here is sixty.
maximum.zh: 這裡的最高速限是六十。

measurable.en: There was a measurable rise in temperature.

measure-2.en: The school took measures to keep students safe.
measure-2.zh: 學校採取了保護學生安全的措施。

mechanic.en: The mechanic fixed my car quickly.
mechanic.zh: 技師很快修好了我的車。

mechanical.en: The clock has a mechanical part inside.
mechanical.zh: 這個時鐘裡有機械零件。

memorable.en: The trip was a memorable experience.
memorable.zh: 這趟旅行是個難忘的經驗。

memorial.en: They built a memorial for the heroes.
memorial.zh: 他們為英雄們建了一座紀念碑。

memorize.en: I need to memorize these words.

merchant.en: The merchant sold silk and spices.
merchant.zh: 這位商人販賣絲綢和香料。

mercy.en: The king showed mercy to the prisoner.
mercy.zh: 國王對囚犯展現了仁慈。

mere.en: It cost a mere ten dollars.

messenger.zh: 一名信差送來了那封信。

messy.zh: 他的房間總是亂七八糟。

microscope.en: We looked at cells through a microscope.
microscope.zh: 我們用顯微鏡觀察細胞。

mild.en: The weather is mild in spring.

mill.en: The mill grinds wheat into flour.

millionaire.en: He became a millionaire from his business.
millionaire.zh: 他靠生意成了百萬富翁。

mineral.zh: 牛奶含有有用的礦物質。

minimum.en: The minimum age to enter is twelve.
minimum.zh: 入場的最低年齡是十二歲。

minister.en: The minister gave a speech on TV.
minister.zh: 部長在電視上發表演說。

ministry.en: She works for the Ministry of Education.

mischief.en: The kids got into mischief while alone.
mischief.zh: 孩子們獨處時調皮搗蛋。

miserable.en: He felt miserable when he was sick.

misfortune.en: She faced misfortune but never gave up.
misfortune.zh: 她遭遇不幸卻從不放棄。

mislead.en: The false sign misled the drivers.
mislead.zh: 錯誤的標誌誤導了駕駛。

moderate.en: Eat a moderate amount of sweets.

modest.zh: 雖然得了獎，她依然謙虛。

modesty.en: His modesty made everyone like him.
modesty.zh: 他的謙遜讓大家都喜歡他。

monitor.en: The nurse monitored the patient closely.
monitor.zh: 護士密切監測病人的狀況。

monument.en: The monument honors the brave soldiers.
monument.zh: 這座紀念碑紀念勇敢的士兵。

moreover.en: It is late; moreover, I am tired.

motivate.en: A good teacher can motivate students.

motivation.en: Her motivation to win was strong.

mountainous.en: The country is mountainous and cold.

muddy.en: His boots were covered in muddy water.

mule.en: The mule carried goods up the hill.

multiple.en: There are multiple ways to solve it.

murderer.en: The murderer was sent to prison.

murmur.en: She heard a low murmur from the crowd.
murmur.zh: 她聽到人群中傳來低語。

mysterious.en: A mysterious light appeared in the sky.
mysterious.zh: 天空中出現了一道神秘的光。

namely.en: Two students passed, namely Tom and Amy.
namely.zh: 兩位學生通過了，也就是湯姆和艾咪。

needy.en: They gave food to needy families.
needy.zh: 他們把食物給有需要的家庭。

negotiate.zh: 他們協商出一個公平的價格。

nevertheless.en: It was hard; nevertheless, she tried.

nightmare.en: She woke up from a bad nightmare.

noble.en: Helping the poor is a noble act.
noble.zh: 幫助窮人是高尚的行為。

nonsense.en: Stop talking nonsense and be serious.
nonsense.zh: 別再胡說八道，認真一點。

nowadays.zh: 現在大多數人都用智慧型手機。

nuclear.en: The country built a nuclear power plant.
nuclear.zh: 這個國家建了一座核能電廠。

numerous.en: She has numerous books at home.

nursery.en: Young plants grow in the nursery.

obedience.en: The dog was trained for obedience.

obedient.en: She is an obedient and polite child.
obedient.zh: 她是個聽話又有禮貌的孩子。

objection.en: He raised no objection to the plan.
objection.zh: 他對這個計畫沒有異議。

objective.en: Our main objective is to win.
objective.zh: 我們的主要目標是獲勝。
